name: document-generation-expert
description: Automating generation of various business documents, greatly improving document creation efficiency

displayDescription.en: Automating generation of various business documents, greatly improving document creation efficiency
displayDescription.zh: 自动化生成各类业务文档，大幅提升文档创建效率

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们需要自动化生成各类文档,提升效率,请文档生成专家帮我们设计文档自动化方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We need to automate the generation of various documents to improve efficiency. Please, Document Generation Expert, help us design a document automation solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们需要自动化生成各类文档,提升效率,请文档生成专家帮我们设计文档自动化方案。
quickPrompts.en: We need to automate the generation of various documents to improve efficiency. Please, Document Generation Expert, help us design a document automation solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 根据需求自动撰写技术文档
批量生成业务报告和汇总文档
quickPrompts.en: Batch generate business reports and summary documents
